titleStmt.title: SII 11.147: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 147. (B.K. No. 151 of 1926-27.) CHIKKAHANDIGŌḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE HANUMĀN TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and commences with the praise of the king's general, Anantapāla Daṇḍādhīśa who is stated to have been ruling over the Two-Six-hundred (province), Banavāse-nāḍu, Kūṇḍi-nāḍu and Baḷayavaṭṭaṇa. It then proceeds to mention his younger brothers Nāraṇadēva, Vāvaṇa, and Lakkaṇa and their officer Mādhava who was administering the Beḷvala country. It mentions the charities founded by Mādhava at Anyataṭāka (Aṇṇigeri). It then records the foundation of a tank and a temple of Mādhavēśvara at Kiṟiya Pandigoḷa (Chikkahandigōḷ) by Mādhava's son Pratikaṇṭha Chanda and also gifts of lands and house-site made by him to the temple, after purchasing them from the Sixty-Four Mahājanas of the place. The epigraph was composed by Malla and engraved by Rūvāri Kētōja.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 24, Pramādin, Pushya, ba. 8, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The date is irregular. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti occurred on Pushya śu. 10, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1099, December 25, Sunday, ·22.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē © Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ)
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁ saluttamire . tatpadakamaḷaniṣēvaṇatatparanene negaḷdanadhikabaḷa natiśayasaṁpatpada narāti janajaḷabhṛtpavana nana
ntapāḷadaṇḍādhīśa . Eṟagada paradēśaṁgaḷa neṟagada durggaṁgaḷaṁ samudraṁbiḍidirddeṟagada nṛpa raṁ nijapatigeṟagisida nanantapā
ḷadaṇḍādhīśa . vri . muḷididirādudādoḍidiraṁ muḷisiṁda manantapāḷa nāgaḷe ygumāgaḷe kaḍaṁgugumā
gaḷe naṭṭunilku māgaḷe taṟisalgu māgaḷe taṟuṁpugu māgaḷe ṟoṭṭuvāygu māgaḷe paḍepoygumāgaḷe poraḷcu
gu māgaḷe koṁdu kūgugu . Adaṭinoḷāda darppamanadēvogaḷdappu danantapāḷanaṁkada pṛta nādhinātharire taṁnane
vikramacakravarti pēḷvudu maṟeyaṭṭi kaṭṭidi�ḷeydida kaṁṭakadanta tāmmi di ḷiyellamaṁ nijabhujārggaḷadiṁ
puḍiguṭṭi tūṟida . gaganataḷaṁbaraṁ negeda dhāḷiya dhūḷige bercci dāḷigaṁ tegedu vanānta maṁ puge guhāntaramaṁ puge śai
ḷakuṁjamaṁ puge parabhūmiyaṁ puge tapōvanamaṁ puge sindhukūṭamaṁ puge caladintaguḷda bhujagarvvamananta manantapāḷana .
va . Ā mahāsēnādhipatiśiraśśēkhara neraḍaṟunūṟa ṟanubhavaṇiyoḷaṁ . banavāsenā ḍadhikārado ḷaṁ kūṇḍināḍāḷkeyoḷaṁ
baḷayavaṭṭaṇada saṁvaraṇeyoḷa manēkaniyōgalakṣmīsamāvāptiyoḷaṁ . cakravarttiya kāruṇyadoḷa magaṇya
puṇyavarēṇyanu maśēṣapradhānajanāgragaṇyanumāgi . vri . tribhuvanamalladēvana pasāyita nāda nanantapāḷa
nāvibhuvina tamma nūrjjitayaśōnidhi nāraṇadēva nāraviprabha nanuja rjjasaṁbaḍeda vāvaṇa lakkaṇadēva rā mahāvibha
vara kāryasiddhige dhuraṁdharanāda niyōgi mādhava . palaraṁ meccisidaṁ niyōgadoḷanē kōpāyacāṇakya nujvaḷatē
jōmukhamudritapracuradēśadrōhasaṁcāracāpaḷanātmīkṛtaśastrakauśaḷa śēṣa vidyāviniścaḷanāna
vranijaprajāmravanamāḷāmādhavaṁ mādhava . nalinalidekkeyiṁ paḍeda mānasarāru manū namāda beḷvala dadhikārado
ḷnaḍedu manyataṭākadoḷeyde dēvatāniḷayamahādvijanmagṛhasatranikētanadivyadīrgghi kāvaḷigaḷanoppe māḍisi
da mādhavanante kṛtārttharādarē . śrīpatiye tande tāyuṁ śrīpatiye sagōtramitra putrādigaḷuṁ śrīpatiye po
reva patiyuṁ śrīpatiye sarasvatīgaṇaṁgaḷgella . Āda negartteyoḷaggaḷamādudu saṁpatti satyamādudu nuḍi mēlādudu
dharmmaṁ nirmmaḷamādudu nijakuḷaśubhōdayaṁ śrīpatiya . śrīpati tāne mādhavanenippanegarttege sanda mādhavaṁ śrīpati
tāne bhāvisuvoḍirvvaru morvvare tammoḷeṁbinaṁ śrīpatiyāda mādhavana pratikaṇṭhavādudaṁ śrīpatigaḷpala
rppogaḷvinaṁ negaḷdattu negartte candana . guṇadoḷmikkanegartte yakkarigarāruṁ kūrmmeyiṁ kōṭi soḷeṇisaltakka manīṣi
janacūḍāmaṇḍanaṁ mānavāgraṇi māvaṁ sirivarmma nōjegoḷisalsandakṣaraśrīge bhūṣaṇamādattu niyōgado
ḷnaḍeva cāturyyakramaṁ candana . ka . Antenisida guṇanidhi digantamanaydu vina mesada pesaresakamanantanta
baḷayisida candana santatiya samagra mahime tānentuṭenal . vanajabhavavaṁśa raṟuvatta nālvarārjjisida kiṟiya
pandigoḷaṁ bhūvinutamenisidudu vidvajjanadiṁ dadhyayanamukharamukhavaṭujanadiṁ dvijapuṁgavarāpottuṁ
vēdavihitadharmmaṁgaḷo ḷārōpitamatiga ḷeṁdanisida śāpānugrahasamarttha ruditaparā rtthar . Ā kiṟiyapanḍigo
ḷado ḷanēkabudhastuta nudāracaritaṁ lōkāḷōkanadarppaṇa nakhiḷakaḷākuśaḷaṁ sumati māramayyaṁ negaḷda . jaga
maṟiye māramayyana bageyaṁ bagedanta bagege varisida guṇadoḷnegaḷdirdda kaṁci kabbeya nagartteyaṁ
pogaḷalāvaṁ neṟeva . Ā māramayyaneṁba mahāmahimana sūnu vāvaṇayyaṁ vipra stōmado ḷuttama niḷā
marajanamarttivaṭṭu kīrttisuvinega . Ā vāvaṇana kuḷāṁgane bhūvandite nāgiyabbe patibhaktiyi nurvvīvaḷayado
ḷage nirupamalāvaṇyaviḷāsamesevinaṁ prakaṭisidaḷ . Ā negaḷda vāvaṇaṁgaṁ sūnṛta nāgiyabbega ma
dhikaśrīniḷayaṁ puṭṭida nabhimānadhanaṁ mādirāja nūrjjitatēja . vri . neṟeye negarttavettudu niyōgama
guṁdaleyāytu tēja macciṟidudu mikka biccatike sa da mādudu nanni nāḍe kaṇḍoṟedudu rū du daritaṁ
daḷamēṟidu dakkaraṁ pagaṇḍiṟidudu pauruṣaṁ saphaḷamādudu mānyate mādirājanoḷ . santatamādamā
yiṁ palaraṁ poredāvameyyoḷaṁ santati perccuvantu negaḷdīśvarapādapayōjayugma saṁkrāntamanōvibhū
yāgi kṛtārtthanē nādeneṁ taḷedirddudoṁdu caritaṁ kiṟi mādi rājana . palaruṁ lōkadoḷīca mē
rppaṭṭāsayiṁ bandu sāraloḍaṁ nōḍe paṟōpakāramide lēsendāgaḷuṁ tannoḷēṁ nelisirddarttiyoḷappukeydunitumaṁ
bhūdēvasandōhamaṁ sale sarvvasvamanittu mannisidanāvaṁ mādirājaṁ varaṁ . saṁbuve deyva vabjajakuḷaṁ kuḷamuttame
yāda rēvakabbāṁbike patni vāma nanujaṁ kuḷadīpakanāda viśvavidyāṁbudhi canda nagratanayaṁ sose jakkaṇaka
bbeyendaḍāraṁ bagegoḷḷa daggaḷikevetta kṛtārtthate mādirājana . kuḷavanitāśirōmaṇi samastasuhṛjjanakā
madhēnu nirmmaḷamati mādirājanayanōtpaḷacaṁdrike śaiḷakanyakācaraṇasarōjaṣaṭpade nijānvaya
dhamaṇipradīpikākaḷikeyenuttumurbbare guṇaṁgoḷutirppudu rēvakabbeya . kaṁ . dore vaḍe deḷegesedu
du mādirājakaḷpāvanījadoḷtaḷtu manōharamāda kalpalateyantire porddi rēvakabbāṁbikeya . Ā mā
dirājavibhuga miḷāmānitayāda rēvakabbega madhikaśrīmaṇḍana nudiyisida niḷāmarajanana yanaku
mudacaṁdraṁ caṁda . pracayake sanda beḷaginoḷe carācaramādudellamaṁ beḷaguva cāru caritramesevinaṁ negaḷdacaṁ
dranātrēyagōtramaṁ prakaṭisida . dvijakuḷatiḷakaṁ caṁdrānuja nuttamapuruṣa nuttamōttama padumaja
bāppenalittaditijakujamenisida nartthisamitigellaṁ mallaṁ . janakaṁ mādhava naṁbike janavandite rēvakabbe tammaṁ mallaṁ vi
nayanidhi dēvaṇaṁ mitranenal kṛtakṛtyanenisi sandaṁ candaṁ . piriyaniyōgadoḷnaḍedeveṁba niyōgigaḷella
melliyuṁ piriyaremendu permmege kaḍaṁgidoḍaṁ pratikaṇṭhacandaniṁ piriyare nītimantare mahāmatimantare mi
kka puṇyamantare sale satyamantare karaṁ guṇamantare kāntimantarē . parikipo ḍellarakkaramu makkaramē pratikaṁṭa ca
ndanakkarame negartteyakkara manēkarumaṁ porevakkaraṁ mahīśvarara sabhāntarāḷama naḷaṁkaripakkaramentu māḷdanaṁ piri
yadaguntiyoḷnilisu vakkara mupparavaṭṭadakkara . Ā puṇyapuruṣanaṁgane rūpinoḷaṁ guṇa doḷaṁ manōharama
dhurāḷāpadoḷa mesedaḷakhiḷamahīpūjite jakkaṇabbe jāyājanadoḷ . peṟatēnelliyu moppitōṟuva mahā
tīrtthōdakaśrīge tāneṟevaṭṭāytu dharāmarapratatigellaṁ sēvyamāyteṁbinaṁ keṟeyaṁ kaṭṭisi mādhavēśvarama
natyutsāhadiṁ candanākeṟegoppaṁ baḍevantumāḍisida nī lōkaṁ guṇaṁgoḷvinaṁ . Inaśaśi gaḷesevinaṁ nijajanakana pe
saraseye mādhavēśvaramaṁ mēdini koṇḍu koneye māḍisida nakhiḷabudhajanacakōracandraṁ caṁda . © ©
Ā mādhavēśvaradēvargge cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 24 neya pramādi saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 8 Ādivāra vutta
rāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyandu pratikaṇṭa nūrōḍeyapramukha mahājanavaṟuvatta nālvarggaṁ dānā
rtthavāgi dravyanivēdanaṁgeydu koṇḍu mattar 20 dēvara satrakke biṭṭa Ekkeyyagala I
ppatteṁṭu keyya nīḷada mane 1 dēgula ṇa 1 nāgēśvaradēvara tōṁṭa diṁ baḍagalu Irppattugēṇa
gaḷayal kuḷiya tōṁṭaṁ mattar 1 baḍagalu kiṟidantaradoḷ sarasvatī dēviya keyyiṁ teṁkalu
poladiṁ paḍuvalu . karuvēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ baḍagalu . Ūra poladiṁ mūḍa lu munne pramāṇisi baredirppa
keyyoḷage dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōdhdhārakkaṁ sarvva namasyamāgi biṭṭa mattar 11 diṟa
yiṁ baḍagalu . karuvēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ paḍuvalu . Ā mādhavēśvara dēvara keyyiṁ teṁkalu . Ū
mūḍalu . guṇasāmyadiṁ vēdavida pūjārige sarvvanamasyamāgi biṭṭa mattar 9 Intinitu
yapramukha mahājanamaṟuvattanālvaruṁ sarvvabādhāparihāra māgi sarvvanamasyamāgi kādūḍu
rmmavaṁ svadharmmadiṁ rakṣisidaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāge Argghyatīrtthaṁ modalāge neladoḷuḷḷa
gaḷoḷu caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge sāsira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnoḷu kaṭṭisida
sukoṭṭa puṇyamakku . Ī dharmmama naḷida mahāpātakaṁgī pēḷda puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsirvva brāhmaṇaru
kavileyumanaḷida mahāpātakamakku yaṁ dharmmasēturnnipāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāla
dbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvinaṟpārtthivēndrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
harēta vaṣundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . druhiṇavinirmmitamena
ṇayutaṁ bāṇagadyavālikhita pitāmahanendoreyoḷoppira laharṇniśaṁ baredane
ya mallaṁ . kundurageya siṅgōjana putraṁ rūvāri kētōjaṁ besageyda . ©
Digital edition of SII 11.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
